text: A wide-angle photograph of a busy street scene in a city, likely in India, under a cloudy sky. The street is lined with multi-story buildings, utility poles, and overhead wires. Several cars are visible in the foreground and middle ground. A large blue and white billboard advertising 'G' (likely for Gionee) is prominent on the right side. Blue flags are hanging from the buildings on the left.
